message:
feat(core,extras,pty,runtime,layout): anti-deadlock and thread-safety hardening pass

Systematic elimination of blocking joins, reentrant lock deadlocks, and
stuck-thread hazards across the entire crate graph.

caps_probe: Replace background-thread TTY probe with nonblocking
O_NONBLOCK polling loop. Eliminates stuck reader threads from timed-out
capability probes. Adds libc dependency for O_NONBLOCK flag.

live: Add WriterAccessGuard with Condvar-based ownership tracking per
ThreadId for reentrant write protection. join_refresh_thread_bounded()
with 250ms timeout detaches stuck threads instead of blocking Drop.

logging: Same reentrancy protection for TracingConsoleLayer via
ConsoleAccessGuard. Nested log events are dropped instead of deadlocking.

pty_capture, lib, pty_process, ws_bridge: All PTY session Drop impls
replaced with detach_reader_join() pattern — background descendants
keeping PTY FDs open no longer block Drop. Each module gets a named
detach thread for diagnostics.

debug: Layout debugger telemetry lock scope fix. telemetry_hooks changed
to Option<Arc<LayoutTelemetryHooks>> with snapshot-then-drop pattern to
prevent deadlock when hooks call back into the debugger.

process_subscription: Rewrite from thread::scope to spawned threads +
bounded join. make_msg changed from Box<dyn Fn> to Arc<dyn Fn> for
cross-thread sharing. 250ms timeout with detach fallback.

render_thread: Same bounded join pattern for render thread shutdown with
250ms timeout.

state_persistence: flush() now clones cache, drops read lock, saves,
then re-acquires lock to check for mutations during save. Preserves
dirty flag if backend mutated registry. Adds PartialEq/Eq for
StoredEntry.

Each module includes targeted tests verifying the new deadlock-free
behavior: reentrancy protection, bounded shutdown, and non-blocking Drop
when background processes hold resources.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
